_description: Default layout tokens for content-skills. Defines spacing, sizing, and grid systems used across presentations, infographics, and web content.
base_unit_description: All spacing values are multiples of 8px

text.description: Maximum width for long-form text content (blog posts, articles). Keeps line length at 65-80 characters for readability.

slides.description: Maximum width for slide content. Standard 16:9 presentation width.

infographic.description: Maximum width for infographic layouts. Narrow enough to read on screen, wide enough for data.

wide.description: Maximum width for full-width layouts and dashboards.

grid.description: Standard 12-column grid. Use 4-column for mobile, 8-column for tablet, 12 for desktop.

xxs.usage: Tight gaps between inline elements, icon padding

xs.usage: Small gaps, form field padding, list item spacing

sm.usage: Default padding, paragraph spacing, card padding

md.usage: Section padding, grid gutters, modal padding

xl.usage: Section spacing, hero padding, slide margins

tablet.description: Tablets and large phones in landscape

wide.description: Wide desktop screens and external monitors
